title: Agentic Engineering Strategy Workshop
summary: An executive and architecture workshop that defines the business case, target operating model, governance posture, pilot scope, and roadmap for enterprise agentic engineering.
outcomes: Target operating model and phase model

title: Agentic Engineering Foundation Build
summary: A delivery engagement to establish the platform, governance controls, workflows, reusable assets, and first implementation patterns needed to support governed agentic delivery.
whoItsFor: Organizations moving from experimentation to repeatability
Teams with GitHub Copilot or similar tools already in place
outcomes: Reusable prompts, specs, and review artifacts

title: Agentic Modernization Implementation
summary: A hands-on delivery engagement that applies the model to a real modernization initiative, pairing with client teams to deliver software, uplift ways of working, and transfer capability.
whoItsFor: Organizations seeking paired delivery and knowledge transfer

title: Managed Evolution and Optimization
summary: An ongoing service that tunes the platform, refines agents, improves controls, and expands adoption using operational evidence and measured business value.
whoItsFor: Teams that launched an agentic pilot
Organizations needing ongoing governance and SRE oversight
outcomes: Expanded autonomy where evidence supports it
Prioritized improvements and new use cases
